LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_TargetLang: 【Target Language】\nSet the language you want the AI to translate foreign mods into.
LanguageData.ATC_Tooltip_Provider: 【AI Provider】\nSelect the AI model provider you want to use. Highly recommend Google (Gemini) or OpenAI.
LanguageData.ATC_PlzFetchModel: Please click Fetch Model List first
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_EmptyKey: How can I test without an API Key!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestPulse: [Test] Sending micro pulse to test [{0}] connection status...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestSuccess: [Test] Test successful! AI core is responding well.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_TestFail: [Test] Test failed! Please check your network or API settings.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Init: [Init] Reading mods and building global translation memory pool...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_InitDone: [Init] Done! Collected {0} Def translations in total.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_StartScan: Auto Translation Core started! Target mod count: {0}
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SkipMod: [Skip] No Languages or Defs found, pure code mod.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DefScan: [DefInjected] Starting deep scan and global matching...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FoundMissing: [{0}] Found {1} missing lines! Calling AI backup...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NoMissing: [{0}] All parts intact, no translation needed.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_Clean: [Clean] Production line shut down, memory released.
LanguageData.ATC_CancelRequested: Shutdown command received, hitting the emergency brakes...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_FetchModelsFail: [System] Failed to fetch list, please check your API key.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_NetworkRetry: [System] Network fluctuation or server busy. Automatic retry mechanism triggered...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MigrateSuccess: [Migration] Seamlessly transferred {1} of {0} to the new architecture!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_SingleModDone: Single mod translation task completed perfectly!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ProcessAbortedWithSave: [System] Production line aborted safely; translated content has been saved.
LanguageData.ATC_FinishMessage_Text:
Translation task completed successfully!
【🪂 Memory Drop Success】 The system has legally injected the latest translations directly into the game memory through official channels! You can now close this window and the settings panel; items and technologies on the screen have instantly switched to your target language!
(Note: A physical XML backup has been automatically generated in the background, but you DO NOT need to check it in the mod list! It will be automatically and invisibly mounted next time the game starts, completely bidding farewell to load order conflicts! Have fun gaming!)
LanguageData.ATC_Tutorial_FullText:
【Tutorial】 1. Select [Target Language] (Supports mutual translation between multiple languages including Chinese, Japanese, Korean, English, Russian, Ukrainian, etc.!) and [AI Provider]. Taiwan players are recommended to use free Google (Gemini); Mainland China players are recommended to use DeepSeek!
2. Apply for an [API Key] and paste it. Supports "Infinite API Magazines"! You can click the "+" icon to add multiple API interfaces. The system will automatically round-robin tasks for you, squeezing out every drop of your free quota!
3. [Auto Model Detection] Once the API key is pasted (length must be greater than 10), there is absolutely no need to click any search button; the system will automatically fetch available models in the background! After a successful fetch, simply select the model from the dropdown menu on the right.
4. Adjust [Max Threads] (Recommended setting: number of active interfaces x 3). Then click the green [🚀 Start Full Scan] for a global scan, or use [🎯 Translate Single/Multi Mods] for precise strikes! If you want to abort, you can press [🛑 Emergency Stop] at any time.
5. 【🎉 After Translation】 No need to restart the game at all! The system will automatically execute a "Memory Drop", instantly injecting the translation into the game. Just close the panel to see the results! (The system will generate a physical XML backup in the background, but you DO NOT need to check and enable it in the mod list; it will be automatically and invisibly mounted the next time the game starts!)
【FAQ】 Q: What is "One-Click Hot Reload ＆ Injection"? A: If you are a hardcore player who likes to manually edit the generated translation XML files using a text editor, simply click this button after editing. The system will instantly refresh the frontend UI cache and re-drop the memory, showing you the changes in seconds without restarting!
Q: Why does the log keep flashing red warnings like "Communication Timeout" or "Waiting for Retry"? A: This means the API server is hitting rate limits or busy! The mod has built-in automatic back-off retry and key rotation mechanisms. As long as it displays translation success afterward, just let the bullets fly for a while~ (≧∀≦)ゞ
Q: Why does it fail to connect when using a local backend (LM Studio / Ollama) or proxy API? A: 1. Make sure your "Custom Base URL" is correct (e.g., http://localhost:1234). Don't worry about forgetting the suffix; the system will automatically append /v1 for you! 2. The API Key can absolutely NOT be left empty! If it's a local backend, just type random characters.
Q: Will the dynamic UI interceptor cause lag? A: V2.0 introduces "Lightning Cache" and "Anti-Burst Valve" mechanisms, keeping the game locked at a stable 120FPS even during an error tsunami. However, please note that this feature captures all untranslated foreign text on screen; toggle it wisely if using a paid API to avoid an explosive bill!
LanguageData.ATC_UpdateLog_FullText:
--- V2.0 Epic Overhaul (Memory Drop ＆ 120FPS Ultimate) --- • World First 【Official Memory Drop】: Say goodbye to tedious restarts and enabling mods! Upon translation completion, results are legally injected into the game's main artery, switching the screen to the target language instantly! It mounts invisibly on next launch, completely eliminating load order conflicts! • Epic Performance 【120FPS Dynamic UI Intercept】: Rewrote underlying intercept logic, introducing a "Lightning O(1) Cache Channel" and a "2000-item Ultimate Anti-Burst Valve". Even if the Dev Log spits out a tsunami of tens of thousands of red errors, the game's frame rate remains rock solid! • Hardcore Player Blessing 【One-Click Hot Reload ＆ Injection】: Manually modify translation XML files and click the button to instantly refresh the UI cache and underlying data, viewing results in seconds without a restart!
--- V1.0 Official Release (Ultimate Interceptor ＆ Optimization) --- • Implemented 【Dynamic UI Hardcoded Intercept System】: Raw text missed by static XMLs? Untranslated text in config panels? Now all can be intercepted in real-time and translated automatically! • Epic Performance 【Error Separation ＆ Lightning Cache】: Even Dev Logs are easy to read now! The system precisely separates "Error Subject" from "Underlying Code". • Added 【Word Count Dashboard】: New statistics feature in the settings interface allows you to track current and total historical translated words. • Exclusive 【Cloaking Device Technology】: Perfectly fixed the "Show Original" function, achieving 0-latency bilingual comparison on mouse hover!
--- V4.8 Ultimate Evolution (Multi-Select ＆ Optimize) --- • Implemented 【Mod Multi-Select ＆ Search Interface】: Say goodbye to sore hands! You can now search and check multiple mods at once, batch background translation feels amazing! • Added 【One-Click Skip Current Mod】: Encounter a mod that is stuck or taking too long? Press skip, and the system will instantly sever the connection and seamlessly switch to the next one!
--- V4.7 Speedster Ultimate Update --- • Pioneered 【Infinite API Magazine】 system: Supports setting multiple API interfaces simultaneously. The system automatically runs Round-Robin load-balancing polling, perfectly dodging API rate limits and squeezing out free quotas! • Implemented 【Extreme Speed Thread Adjuster】: No longer locked to 3 threads! Players can freely adjust up to 30 concurrent threads. Combined with multiple API magazines, translation speed breaks through the heavens! • Brand New 【Auto Model Radar】: Automatically probes available models in the background after pasting the API key, removing the tedious manual search button.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MemoryDropSuccess: [Memory Drop] Successfully injected {0} system texts and {1} item defs!
LanguageData.ATC_Button_HotReload: One-Click Hot Reload ＆ Injection (No restart, refresh screen!)
LanguageData.ATC_Message_HotReloadSuccess: 🪂 [Memory Drop] Translation injected in real-time, UI window cache completely flushed!
LanguageData.ATC_ApiConfigTitle: API Interface Magazine Settings (Supports multi-group concurrent polling)
LanguageData.ATC_NoModelWaitKey: No model selected (Paste Key to auto-fetch)
LanguageData.ATC_EmptyConfigWarning: Please configure at least one valid API parameter set!
LanguageData.ATC_MaxThreadsTip: Highly Recommended: Active interfaces count x 3
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiRecovered: [API] Reconnected successfully! Production line resumed high-speed operation.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiRetry: [API] Translation busy or timed out, retrying in {0} seconds...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_ApiFallback: [API] Block translation completely failed. Initiating "Degraded Solo Mode" to crack sentence by sentence...
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_ApiCritical: [Critical API Error] Translation completely failed for text located in 【{0}】! Original text retained.
LanguageData.ATC_MultiSelect_Search: Type mod name here to search...
LanguageData.ATC_Log_MultiScanDone: All multi-selected mod translation tasks completed!
LanguageData.ATC_LogError_OldToxicFiles: 【Warning】 Old abnormal translation files detected! Initiating forced cleanup to prevent errors.
LanguageData.ATC_Log_AutoRebuildStart: 【System】 The system will automatically rebuild a clean translation pack for you!
LanguageData.ATC_Log_UIInterceptorStarted: Dynamic UI Interceptor is online! Background caching system starting...
LanguageData.ATC_EnableUIInterceptor: Enable Dynamic UI Hardcoded Interception 【Warning: May affect performance】
LanguageData.ATC_Log_AdvancedDetoxSuccess: Advanced detox completed! Precisely excised {0} non-compliant tags, safeguarding players' translation assets (Fixed {1} files in total)!
LanguageData.ATC_DeleteModTrans_Title: Translation File Incinerator (Check mods to delete translations)
LanguageData.ATC_ConfirmDelete_Btn: Confirm deletion of {0} mod translation files (Irreversible!)
LanguageData.ATC_Log_DeleteTransSuccess: 🗑️ [ATC System] Successfully deleted translation files for {0} mods (Cleaned {1} files in total)!
LanguageData.ATC_Message_DeleteTransSuccess: Successfully deleted {0} translation files! It is recommended to restart the game to apply changes.
LanguageData.ATC_Message_DeleteTransError: ⚠️ Error occurred while deleting translation files: {0}
LanguageData.ATC_Msg_NoModelListManualInput: No model list fetched currently, please input the model name manually!
LanguageData.ATC_ShowOriginalUI: Show Original UI (Shows raw English before machine translation on mouse hover)
